# 分享会议笔记给所有参会者
recipients = ["张经理", "李明", "王芳", "赵强"]
response = requests.post('http://localhost:60905/notes/share', 
                         json={'note_id': 'note_001', 'recipients': recipients})
print(response.status_code)
print(response.text)
